meta.title: Mean Temperature each Day in June— Central England
meta.subtitle: All 4 June days above 24°C in 254 years were in June 2026
meta.summary: Each dot is one day in June across the full HadCET daily-mean series (Central England). The trend line summarizes the century-scale pattern. Very few June days reach a 24 °C daily mean — explore hover and click below.
meta.captionPlain: Source: Met Office HadCET. Graphic: David Curran
meta.pageTitle: England Kept Breaking Temperature Records in June 2026
meta.pageSummary: May broke records in England — Central England's warmest May day in 254 years came on 26 May 2026. But June was record-breaking by huge margins across many temperature records: daily mean, maximum, and minimum all rewrote the books in late June, often on consecutive days, against every previous June in HadCET since 1772.
